subcodes.first_line: All that dwelleth in the heavens and on earth rendereth praise unto God, and verily He is, over all things, powerful. Before Him boweth down in worship every soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یسبح لله ما فی السموات و الارض و انه کان علی کل شیء قدیرا یسجد له کل من فی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
